method: Chromium browser pane, Navigation Timing API + resource transferSize, localhost, cold page load (no HTTP cache), 800k fixture outputs from the benchmark matrix

peakrdl-html.server: python http.server on generated static output
peakrdl-html.note: entire model (data/ral-data-*.json chunks) transferred and retained by the browser up front; localhost hides the 51.8 MB transfer cost that a remote/VPN link would expose

peakrdl-check.note: shell + metadata + first children page only (225 KB); further data fetched on demand, browser state proportional to what is expanded/requested. JS heap reading is unreliable across pages in a shared renderer and is omitted.
